meaning: n.羊肉,<谑>绵羊,<俚>女性生殖器,性交
examples: This mutton has got a strong smell.
Hotpot is made from mutton and onion.
It has mutton slices and Chinese onion inside.
Assume further that the wool market is soft and American's aren't eating much mutton these days.
James Plaskitt, who is standing as the Labour candidate, said he "strongly disagreed" with Mr Mutton.
